{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1333", "name": "Inefficient Regular Expression Complexity"}], "description": "## Summary

The `HTMLInputElement.checkValidity()` method constructed a `RegExp` directly from the user-controlled `pattern` property without any sanitization or timeout protection. This allowed an attacker to inject a regex with catastrophic backtracking, freezing the event loop.

## Fix

Fixed in commit https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/NogginLessDom/commit/25a3cbac665fae5663f8b71c073b80c3152dbe7b on `main`. Added:
- Pattern length limit (1024 characters)
- Nested quantifier detection (`hasNestedQuantifiers`) that rejects patterns like `(a+)+` before constructing the regex
- Patterns exceeding limits are treated as non-matching (safe default)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x4hg-hfwf-p9mw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T20:20:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x4hg-hfwf-p9mw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x4hg-hfwf-p9mw"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T20:20:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/NogginLessDom/security/advisories/GHSA-x4hg-hfwf-p9mw", "https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/NogginLessDom/commit/25a3cbac665fae5663f8b71c073b80c3152dbe7b", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x4hg-hfwf-p9mw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/asymmetric-effort/NogginLessDom/security-advisories/GHSA-x4hg-hfwf-p9mw", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/asymmetric-effort/NogginLessDom", "summary": "@asymmetric-effort/nogginlessdom vulnerable to ReDoS via user-controlled regex in HTMLInputElement pattern validation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T20:20:04Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x4hg-hfwf-p9mw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.0.22", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@asymmetric-effort/nogginlessdom"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.0.21"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: @asymmetric-effort/nogginlessdom vulnerable to ReDoS via user-controlled regex in HTMLInputElement pattern validation
